creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 177693
Update to 765.20.4

Hi,

Following another update of net/mDNSResponder, dns/mDNSResponder_nss is following with just a version and distinfo bump.

Note that functionality may be impaired by issues in net/mDNSResponder as of now (see https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2016-December/106029.html), but if this issues are resolved at some point in net/mDNSResponder, this port will work again without needing another update.

Thanks
